title: [CAPI] Windows and Nightly Failure after #7960
body:
I'm going to blamelessly revert #7960 (https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/14622691f3c63793411a38b3fa874cb6866c9f43). Please re-land this @SpriteOvO, once you've fixed the issues with it.

Here's what I'm seeing on my end from `valgrind`:

```
# valgrind --track-origins=yes /home/schuylere/scratch/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-clang-clang++-RelWithDebInfo-on-vg/bin/circt-capi-firrtl-test
==3842745== Memcheck, a memory error detector
==3842745== Copyright (C) 2002-2022, and GNU GPL'd, by Julian Seward et al.
==3842745== Using Valgrind-3.21.0 and LibVEX; rerun with -h for copyright info
==3842745== Command: /home/schuylere/scratch/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-clang-clang++-RelWithDebInfo-on-vg/bin/circt-capi-firrtl-test
==3842745==
FIRRTL version 4.1.0
circuit ExportTestSimpleModule :
  public module ExportTestSimpleModule : @[- 2:3]
    input in_1 : UInt<32> @[- 2:44]
    input in_2 : UInt<32> @[- 3:44]
    output out : UInt<32> @[- 4:45]

    connect out, and(in_1, in_2) @[- 6:5]
module {
  firrtl.circuit "AnnoTest" attributes {rawAnnotations = [{class = "firrtl.transforms.DontTouchAnnotation", target = "~AnnoTest|AnnoTest>in"}]} {
    firrtl.module @AnnoTest(in %in: !firrtl.uint<32>) {
    }
  }
}
==3842745== Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
==3842745==    at 0x405B30: testTypeDiscriminantsAndQueries (test/CAPI/firrtl.c:300)
==3842745==    by 0x4065C4: main (test/CAPI/firrtl.c:368)
==3842745==  Uninitialised value was created by a stack allocation
==3842745==    at 0x4053BE: testTypeDiscriminantsAndQueries (test/CAPI/firrtl.c:192)
==3842745==
==3842745== Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
==3842745==    at 0x405B7D: testTypeDiscriminantsAndQueries (test/CAPI/firrtl.c:302)
==3842745==    by 0x4065C4: main (test/CAPI/firrtl.c:368)
==3842745==  Uninitialised value was created by a stack allocation
==3842745==    at 0x409A60: firrtlTypeGetBundle (lib/CAPI/Dialect/FIRRTL.cpp:119)
==3842745==
==3842745==
==3842745== HEAP SUMMARY:
==3842745==     in use at exit: 388,477 bytes in 2,575 blocks
==3842745==   total heap usage: 3,135 allocs, 560 frees, 616,958 bytes allocated
==3842745==
==3842745== LEAK SUMMARY:
==3842745==    definitely lost: 224 bytes in 4 blocks
==3842745==    indirectly lost: 315,133 bytes in 2,566 blocks
==3842745==      possibly lost: 208 bytes in 2 blocks
==3842745==    still reachable: 72,912 bytes in 3 blocks
==3842745==         suppressed: 0 bytes in 0 blocks
==3842745== Rerun with --leak-check=full to see details of leaked memory
==3842745==
==3842745== For lists of detected and suppressed errors, rerun with: -s
==3842745== ERROR SUMMARY: 2 errors from 2 contexts (suppressed: 0 from 0)
```
